name: ModeratorPurchaseContract

methods.name: create_moderator

args.name: hourly_price_algo
args.desc: Hourly price in ALGO (will be converted to microAlgos)

args.name: monthly_price_algo
args.desc: Monthly price in ALGO (will be converted to microAlgos)

args.name: buyout_price_algo
args.desc: Buyout price in ALGO (will be converted to microAlgos)

methods.desc: Initialize the contract with moderator details and pricing.

methods.name: purchase_hourly_access

args.name: payment
args.desc: Payment transaction for the hourly access

methods.desc: Purchase pay-as-you-go hourly access to the moderator.

methods.name: purchase_monthly_license

args.name: payment
args.desc: Payment transaction for the monthly license

methods.desc: Purchase monthly license access to the moderator.

methods.name: buyout_moderator

returns.desc: Success message with ownership transfer details

methods.desc: Purchase permanent ownership of the moderator.

methods.name: get_moderator_info

returns.desc: Tuple containing pricing info and ownership details

methods.desc: Get moderator pricing and ownership information.

returns.desc: Tuple containing access type, expiry, and remaining hours
Tuple containing total transactions and revenue

methods.name: update_pricing
methods.desc: Update moderator pricing (only owner can do this).

methods.name: withdraw_funds
methods.desc: Withdraw contract funds (only contract owner can do this).

desc:
Smart contract for handling moderator purchases with three pricing models:
    - Pay-as-you-go (hourly)
    - License (monthly)
    - Buyout (permanent)

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Only contract owner can withdraw funds
Only moderator owner can update pricing
Payment must be to contract address
Payment sender must match transaction sender
can only call when not creating
